title: brunfelsia obovata var. coriacea
intro: Brunfelsia obovata var. coriacea, also known as the 'Horse-Eye', is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of anxiety and insomnia, due to its high content of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Brunfelsia obovata var. coriacea include its sedative and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to reduce stress and alleviate symptoms of menopausal hot flashes. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
